comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Root cause identified from task details: run did complete block computation but FAILED at final save due DynamoDB item size limit (400KB) when writing ReportBlock output. Error from task b5c8e53f-2a49-4e49-9511-fa7197ade65a: 'Item size to update has exceeded the maximum allowed size'. Implementing output-size reduction (remove full indexed_doc_ids payload) before rerunning.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Live status check: report task b5c8e53f-2a49-4e49-9511-fa7197ade65a failed in Finalizing Report with DynamoDB size limit error while writing block output ("Item size to update has exceeded the maximum allowed size"). This explains why the report page never showed a usable result despite long processing time. Next action in progress: reduce VectorTopicMemory persisted output payload size (store counts/summaries instead of full per-doc IDs), rerun AW 60-day report, and confirm a successful finalized report artifact.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Implemented fix for hidden finalization failure: report service now externalizes oversized block output JSON to an attached output JSON file and stores a compact inline preview so DynamoDB item-size limits do not fail Finalizing Report. Also reduced VectorTopicMemory inline payload by replacing full indexed doc ID list with indexed_doc_count plus indexed_doc_ids_sample (first 25). Added regression tests in plexus/reports/tests/test_service_output_compaction.py; targeted test run passed (16 passed). Starting fresh AW 60-day rerun now to verify end-to-end report finalizes.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Design correction applied per request: output artifacts will be persisted as attachments for report blocks by default (not only in oversize failures). Inline output remains for compatibility, but may be compacted to preview when size-risky. Implementing now, then rerunning AW 60-day report.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Completed architecture adjustment: report block output artifacts are now attached by default (not only in oversize cases). Service now uploads output-<report_block_id>.json when S3 details storage is available, and only compacts inline output when above inline size threshold. Added tests for always-attach and oversize-compaction paths; targeted suite now passes (18 passed). Triggering a fresh AW 60-day run next.
